raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The reported pass@1 numbers (NoCritique 76.8/69.5 > Single 74.2/67.1 > Full 71.4/64.8) are monotonically inverted relative to the text's conclusion that 'the full 3-round loop delivers the strongest results' and that 'removing the reviewer agent lowers pass@1 substantially'; catching this internal inversion is central to any technical review of the section.","R1.3":"Table 2 is explicitly cited to substantiate claims that are factually reversed by the table's own values—the no-critique ablation achieves the highest pass@1 on both benchmarks, directly contradicting the stated evidence-driven conclusion; evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing if the review scope is scientific.","R1.6":"A bare 'review this section' instruction routinely encompasses prose quality; the writing is fluent but embeds the erroneous interpretive sentences noted above, which a writing-focused review would also surface, making this dimension central if the scope is editorial."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the review prioritize scientific/technical correctness—verifying that the prose conclusions match the numbers in Table 2—or writing and prose quality—improving clarity, style, and flow?"}

rationale.R1.2: The reported pass@1 numbers (NoCritique 76.8/69.5 > Single 74.2/67.1 > Full 71.4/64.8) are monotonically inverted relative to the text's conclusion that 'the full 3-round loop delivers the strongest results' and that 'removing the reviewer agent lowers pass@1 substantially'; catching this internal inversion is central to any technical review of the section.
rationale.R1.3: Table 2 is explicitly cited to substantiate claims that are factually reversed by the table's own values—the no-critique ablation achieves the highest pass@1 on both benchmarks, directly contradicting the stated evidence-driven conclusion; evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing if the review scope is scientific.
rationale.R1.6: A bare 'review this section' instruction routinely encompasses prose quality; the writing is fluent but embeds the erroneous interpretive sentences noted above, which a writing-focused review would also surface, making this dimension central if the scope is editorial.

parsed.clarification_question: Should the review prioritize scientific/technical correctness—verifying that the prose conclusions match the numbers in Table 2—or writing and prose quality—improving clarity, style, and flow?
